title: Nestlé India Limited Board Meeting scheduled for April 21, 2026 to consider audited financial results for FY26 under Regulation 29 - scanx.trade
content:
Nestlé India Limited Board Meeting scheduled for April 21, 2026 to consider audited financial results for FY26 under Regulation 29
Nestlé India Limited announced a board meeting on April 21, 2026, to review standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the financial year ending March 31, 2026. The company has implemented a trading window closure from April 1-23, 2026, following SEBI insider trading regulations, with formal communication made under Regulation 29 of SEBI listing requirements.
*this image is generated using AI for illustrative purposes only.
Nestlé India Limited has officially announced that its Board of Directors will convene on April 21, 2026, to consider the audited financial results for the financial year ending March 31, 2026. The announcement was made through a formal communication to stock exchanges on March 24, 2026, under Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
Board Meeting Details
The company has scheduled the board meeting for Tuesday, April 21, 2026, specifically to review both standalone and consolidated audited financial results for FY26. This meeting represents a crucial milestone in the company's annual financial reporting cycle.
Trading Window Closure
In compliance with SEBI regulations, Nestlé India has announced the closure of its trading window from April 1, 2026, to April 23, 2026 (both days inclusive). This closure is implemented in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
Regulatory Compliance and Communication
The announcement has been made under Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has communicated this information to both BSE Limited (Scrip Code: 500790) and National Stock Exchange of India Limited (Symbol: NESTLEIND).
The formal communication was signed by Pramod Kumar Rai, Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, with digital signature authentication dated March 24, 2026. The company has uploaded this intimation on its official website at www.nestle.in for stakeholder reference.
Company Information
Nestlé India Limited operates from its corporate office at Nestlé House, Jacaranda Marg, 'M' Block, DLF City, Phase – II, Gurugram – 122002, Haryana. The company maintains investor communications through investor@in.nestle.com and provides comprehensive information on its website www.nestle.in .
